baseline.name: parquet_zstd_duckdb
baseline.query_sql:
WITH priced AS (
  SELECT
    row_id AS rid,
    CAST(ROUND((close) / 0.01) AS BIGINT) AS px
  FROM read_parquet('/tmp/zpe-ft-phase3-artifacts/_tmp/yahoo_spy_10y_daily.parquet')
),
deltas AS (
  SELECT
    rid,
    COALESCE(px - LAG(px) OVER (ORDER BY rid), 0) AS delta
  FROM priced
),
tokens AS (
  SELECT
    rid,
    CASE WHEN delta <= -8 THEN 0 WHEN delta <= -3 THEN 1 WHEN delta <= -1 THEN 2 WHEN delta = 0 THEN 3 WHEN delta = 1 THEN 4 WHEN delta <= 3 THEN 5 WHEN delta <= 7 THEN 6 ELSE 7 END AS token
  FROM deltas
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS hits
FROM tokens t0
JOIN tokens t1 ON t1.rid = t0.rid + 1 AND t1.token = 7
JOIN tokens t2 ON t2.rid = t0.rid + 2 AND t2.token = 7
JOIN tokens t3 ON t3.rid = t0.rid + 3 AND t3.token = 0
JOIN tokens t4 ON t4.rid = t0.rid + 4 AND t4.token = 0
JOIN tokens t5 ON t5.rid = t0.rid + 5 AND t5.token = 7
WHERE t0.token = 7

benchmarks.notes: SPY is used as the public S&P 500 ETF proxy for this benchmark.

baseline.name: parquet_zstd_duckdb
baseline.query_sql:
WITH priced AS (
  SELECT
    row_id AS rid,
    CAST(ROUND((((bid + ask) * 0.5)) / 0.01) AS BIGINT) AS px
  FROM read_parquet('/tmp/zpe-ft-phase3-artifacts/_tmp/binance_btcusdt_aggtrades_2019_01.parquet')
),
deltas AS (
  SELECT
    rid,
    COALESCE(px - LAG(px) OVER (ORDER BY rid), 0) AS delta
  FROM priced
),
tokens AS (
  SELECT
    rid,
    CASE WHEN delta <= -8 THEN 0 WHEN delta <= -3 THEN 1 WHEN delta <= -1 THEN 2 WHEN delta = 0 THEN 3 WHEN delta = 1 THEN 4 WHEN delta <= 3 THEN 5 WHEN delta <= 7 THEN 6 ELSE 7 END AS token
  FROM deltas
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS hits
FROM tokens t0
JOIN tokens t1 ON t1.rid = t0.rid + 1 AND t1.token = 7
JOIN tokens t2 ON t2.rid = t0.rid + 2 AND t2.token = 0
JOIN tokens t3 ON t3.rid = t0.rid + 3 AND t3.token = 3
JOIN tokens t4 ON t4.rid = t0.rid + 4 AND t4.token = 7
JOIN tokens t5 ON t5.rid = t0.rid + 5 AND t5.token = 7
WHERE t0.token = 0

benchmarks.notes: Trade tape mapped into the repo tick schema with bid=ask=trade price and bid_size=ask_size=quantity because Binance public monthly aggTrades do not expose top-of-book quotes.
